subject: Human Resources
title: Digital Literacy for Everyone
description: A quick win: understand Digital Literacy for Everyone.

hook.text: A senior HR director can't use the company's new analytics platform. She's brilliant with people—digitally stranded.

buildup.text: Digital literacy isn't just for tech workers—every role now requires comfort with data, digital tools, and online collaboration.

discovery.text: Basic digital fluency includes data interpretation, cybersecurity awareness, AI tool usage, and digital communication etiquette.

twist.text: The digital divide isn't just generational—it follows socioeconomic lines. Lack of digital access creates lack of digital skill.

climax.text: Organizations must provide digital upskilling for all employees—meeting people where they are, not assuming digital comfort.

punchline.text: Digital literacy isn't optional anymore. It's the new professional baseline.

quiz.question: What does basic digital fluency include?
options: Data interpretation, cybersecurity awareness, AI tools, and digital communication
